title: viola × raunsiensis
intro: Viola × raunsiensis, also known as the hybrid viola, is a plant that belongs to the viola genus, which is a group of flowering plants in the family Violaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Viola × raunsiensis include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues such as constipation and diarrhea. Herbal preparations of Viola × raunsiensis can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, and it is also used in folk medicine as a topical treatment for skin irritations and wounds.
